query:
-- ANALYSIS:
-- S0883 planName = "Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 24 Months AVC000101436766"
--   Correctly matched to: DG-3D8AA0394CB5474BAFAD019C9D77 (24 Months, AVC000101436766, $135.69) ✓
--   Incorrectly also matched to: DG-11CF97791B9A4A7DBF77019C9D77 (12 Months, no AVC, $142.58) ✗
-- S0884 planName = "Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 36 Months AVC000106664528"
--   Correctly matched to: DG-F0CBA4D95817422084F1019C9D77 (36 Months, AVC000106664528, $128.79) ✓
--   Incorrectly also matched to: DG-CC56E77CA4F94BC99E48019C9D77 (12 Months, no AVC, $142.58) ✗

-- Check if there's a third NBN service for CF Aust that should receive the 12-month items
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, locationAddress, avcId, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0058' AND serviceType = 'Internet'
ORDER BY externalId;

SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, locationAddress, avcId, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0058' AND serviceType = 'Internet'
ORDER BY externalId;
